task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a successful wget/curl command downloading the image to ~/Downloads/guitar.jpg, or a web browser showing the image being saved to that path.

task_completion.description: Add a binary column named 'ProfileImage' to the 'Artist' table
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Base Table Design view for the 'Artist' table showing a new field named 'ProfileImage' with a Field Type of 'Image [LONGVARBINARY]' or similar binary type.

task_completion.description: Create a form named 'ArtistPhotoManager' for the 'Artist' table
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Base main window showing 'ArtistPhotoManager' listed under the Forms section.

task_completion.description: Include an Image Control bound to the 'ProfileImage' field in the form
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form Design view showing an Image Control on the form, with its Properties dialog open showing the 'Data field' property set to 'ProfileImage'.

task_completion.description: Upload the guitar image for the artist 'Accept' (ArtistId: 2) using the new form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'ArtistPhotoManager' form open in data entry/view mode, showing the record for ArtistId 2 ('Accept'), with the downloaded guitar image visible inside the image control.

task_completion.description: Save all changes to the database file
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Base main window showing the 'Save' icon clicked/disabled indicating changes are saved, or the application being cleanly closed after modifications.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreOffice Base GUI to modify the schema and create the form
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show LibreOffice Base windows (Table Design, Form Design) being actively used, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts executing SQL directly.

integrity.description: Agent uploaded the image using the form interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Image Control in the form (e.g., right-clicking to 'Insert Image from...') rather than using a script to insert the binary data.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual specified guitar image
integrity.visual_evidence: The image visible in the form's image control must be the guitar image from Wikimedia Commons, not a random placeholder image.
